Their form seems a bit up and down.

Their goals scored average is 2.13, and conceded 0.47, which is very strong. Their recent matches include a 1-1 draw with Brazil, a 4-0 win against Madagascar, and a 5-0 win against Burundi. They also had a 2-1 win against Paraguay and a 1-1 draw with Ecuador. Their defense is solid, and they score a lot. They also did well in the African Cup of Nations, with wins against Senegal, Cameroon, etc.
